aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical components such as reviews, detailed content, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Generate and manage customer reviews to enhance credibility and visibility.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific pages, and relevant keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for better search engine visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic contact information but lacks a consistent and detailed Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged GBP, missing out on local search opportunities and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.
Incomplete business information (e.g., hours, services, photos).

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web, which can affect local search rankings.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure consistency in NAP details on the website, social media, and third-party sites.
Claim and verify business listings on major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in Nassau & Queens.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing GBP listing.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, location-specific content and building backlinks from local directories and industry-related websites.

business_name: Excellent Air Conditioning and Heating Services Inc
page_title: HVAC Company Nassau & Queens - Excellent Air Conditioning
